daily.today_energy: Your magnetic energy is hitting different today, Leo. The cosmos is giving you permission to be unapologetically yourself. Channel that heat into whatever makes your soul feel alive—the universe is watching and rooting for you.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, today's about recognizing your own worth first. If someone special crosses your path, they'll feel your confidence. If you're already vibing with someone, let them see the real, unfiltered you.
daily.career: Your ideas are gold right now, even if they feel half-baked. Trust your instincts enough to share them. Today's energy supports taking that one small risk you've been overthinking—your future self will thank you for the courage.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move it like you mean it today. Whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching, getting your energy flowing will shift your entire vibe. Listen to what feels good and honor that.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been screaming. Mercury's doing its thing, making communication feel less filtered and more real. Trust the vibe shifts.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Whether it's new connections or deepening existing ones, the stars are pushing authenticity over performance. Show up as you actually are—it's your superpower rn.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different this week. There's momentum around projects that genuinely excite you. Channel that Leo fire into the work that makes you feel alive, not just the obligations.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence over intensity right now. Movement that feels good matters more than grinding. Sleep, water, and time outside are your main characters this week—don't skip those.
